Metadata.SourceFile: Barry McGuigan World Championship Boxing (Mastertronic Plus).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B30 "BARRYMCGUIGANWORLDCHAMPBOXING-0B30" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Barry McGuigan World Championship Boxing (J1).prg"
